title: Intraday backtest harness: volume/dollar bars + conservative fill model + day-blocked purged WF + OTR exits
source: Split of epic B0162 per methodology survey (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-l2-microstructure-methodology-survey.md)
why: The honest 3-day validation needs: volume bars (~50-100/day/instrument) for features, event entries on raw ticks, conservative taker fill model (cross spread at L1, walk book beyond L1, +50% spread stress arm, 2x cost kill arm, size<=20% L1 depth), day-blocked purged WF with untouched final-5-day holdout, TP/SL via OTR O-U fit on training days (no exit grid search). Reuses triple-barrier, vol-targeting, PSR/DSR (~80% of stack).
scope: Fill simulator per survey spec (assume NOTHING about passive fills).
Day-blocked purged WF splitter (train d1-12 / val d13-17 / holdout final 5d+weekend, crypto-weekend stratum).
Port OTR O-U exit derivation (QuantTradingDocs code/OTR.py.txt) into pipeline.
PSR/DSR gate calc at trade level with sqrt(trades_per_year) annualization.

history.reason: feat(B0162): CEO commits Jun 15-21 L2/microstructure build; methodology survey accepted + epic split B0163-B0168
pm-day 2026-06-12: dispatched to execution-engineer (B0163 done in 2e32daa unblocks it)

Intraday harness built TDD: pipeline/intraday_bars (vol/dollar bars, training-only threshold), intraday_fills (conservative taker, base/stress/kill arms, 20% L1 cap), intraday_wf (day-blocked purged WF, run-once holdout marker), otr (LdP O-U exit derivation), intraday_gate (strategy_metrics/PSR/DSR glue + parametrized gate_check). 78 new tests; full suite 1679 green.
